fields.name: Finance Charge Memo No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the finance charge memo number.
The program retrieves the number from the No. field on the finance charge memo header.
The program uses the finance charge memo number to link the finance charge memo header with the finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the line number.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the various finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the entry number for the customer ledger entry you want to create a finance charge memo line for. The customer ledger entry must be in the same currency as the code on the finance charge memo header.
To see the customer ledger entries in the Cust. Ledger Entry table for this customer, click the field.
The entry number can only be filled in if the Type field contains "Customer Ledger Entry."

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the customer ledger entry that this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date of the customer ledger entry this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the customer ledger entry this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the customer ledger entry this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies an entry description, based on the contents of the Type field.

fields.name: Original Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the original amount of the customer ledger entry that this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining amount of the customer ledger entry this finance charge memo line is for.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in the currency that is represented by the currency code on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Interest Rate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the interest rate that applies to this finance charge memo line.
When the line was created, the program copied the interest rate from the Interest Rate field for the finance charge terms that apply to this customer.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general product posting group of the general ledger account this finance charge memo line is for if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the general product posting group from the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field for the G/L account when the No. field is filled in.
The Gen. Prod. Posting Group field is blank if the finance charge memo line does not contain a G/L account entry.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT percentage that will be used when the line is posted to the general ledger account if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program retrieves the VAT % from the General Posting Setup table.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which VAT calculation type will be used when VAT is calculated if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program retrieves the VAT Calculation Type from the General Posting Setup table.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT amount that is calculated on the line. This amount is in the currency represented by the currency code on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax group code of the general ledger account this finance charge memo line is for if the Type field contains G/L Account.
The program copies the code from the Tax Group Code field for the G/L account when the No. field is filled in.
This field is blank if the line does not contain a G/L account entry.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
If the Type field contains "G/L Account":

This field contains the VAT product posting group of the G/L account this finance charge memo line is for.


The program retrieves the code from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field for the G/L account when the No. field is filled in.


If the Type field contains "Customer Ledger Entry":

This field contains the VAT product posting group of the Interest Account of the Customer Posting Group of the customer this finance charge memo line is for.


If the Type field does not contain G/L Account or Customer Ledger Entry, this field is blank.
To see the VAT product posting groups in the VAT Product Posting Group table, click the field.

fields.name: VAT Identifier
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Automatically copies the value from the VAT Identifier field in the VAT Posting Setup window.

fields.name: Line Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of the finance charge memo line.
The following table describes the options.


Option


Description


Finance Charge Memo Line

The line contains an overdue amount.


Not Due

The line contains the amount that is not overdue yet.


Beginning Text

The line contains the text that starts the reminder.


Ending Text

The line contains the text that ends the reminder.

fields.name: VAT Clause Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT Clause Code that is associated with the sales line.
After you post a sales document, the VAT Clause Code that is associated with the document is copied to the finance charge memo line.

fields.name: System-Created Entry
fields.tooltip:
Contains information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.
The information is stored when you archive a sales quote, purchase quote, or order. The information is copied from the Sales Header or Purchase Header table.
For more information, see Help for the related field.
